description: Decide what to build and why before coding. AI Creative Director + AI Architect + Harness Engineer for evidence-backed architecture and Superpowers-ready handoffs.

defaultPrompt: Use Project Forge to turn this idea into an implementation-ready architecture and harness plan.
Review this project with Project Forge and identify the evidence, verification, and CI gaps.
Check whether this project is Superpowers-ready and explain any blocking gaps.
Help me define a Project Forge evaluation scenario for this agent workflow.
interface.longDescription: Project Forge adds a Creative Design Director, AI Architect, Harness Engineer, and evaluator to the front of a coding workflow. It turns vague ideas into product direction, researches GitHub/web evidence, compares architecture options, writes ADRs, generates harness contracts and CI, and exports Markdown plus JSON handoff packets that can be checked with superpowers-ready before Superpowers takes over implementation.
interface.shortDescription: AI project architect: research-backed stack selection, creative direction, harness contracts, and Superpowers-ready handoffs.

name: project-forge
